summary: Tested Profile → Defaults → Wizard feature end-to-end. Found and fixed critical bug where token was undefined in AuthContext causing 401 errors on profile save. After fix, all features working correctly.

issues: Minor UI inconsistency: Platform commission shows 30% (calculated from profile) but freemium message says 'Fixé à 20%'. The actual value from profile defaults is used, which may be intentional.

passed_tests: Profile page loads with current default values - SUCCESS
Modify profile defaults (cancellation=36, tolerance=10, penalty=99, participant=55, charity=15) - SUCCESS
Save profile and verify success toast - SUCCESS (after bug fix)
Fill Step 1 participants (Jean Dupont, jean.dupont@test.com) - SUCCESS
Fill Step 2 basic info (title, location, datetime, duration) - SUCCESS
Step 3 (Règles d'engagement) prefilled with profile defaults: delay=10, cancellation=36, penalty=99 - SUCCESS
Step 4 (Répartition des pénalités) prefilled with profile defaults: compensation=55%, charity=15%, platform=30% - SUCCESS
Profile values unchanged after wizard navigation (36/10/99/55/15) - SUCCESS
Wizard allows modifying values independently without affecting profile - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AuthContext.js was missing 'token' in the value object. Profile.js and AppointmentWizard.js use 'const { token } = useAuth()' but token was not exposed. Added 'token: localStorage.getItem("nlyt_token")' to the context value.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile defaults feature is fully working. Profile values: cancellation_hours=36, late_tolerance=10, penalty_amount=99, participant_percent=55, charity_percent=15. The wizard correctly prefills these values. Freemium mode shows platform commission as 30% (calculated) but displays 'Fixé à 20%' message - this may need clarification on intended behavior.

bug_fixed.description: AuthContext was not exposing 'token' property, causing Profile page to send 'Bearer undefined' in API requests
bug_fixed.root_cause: Profile.js line 14 uses 'const { user, token } = useAuth()' but AuthContext only provided user, loading, login, register, logout - not token
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added 'const token = localStorage.getItem("nlyt_token")' and included 'token' in the context value object in AuthContext.js
